nasb.text: Samuel said to all the people, “Do you see him whom the Lord has chosen? Surely there is no one like him among all the people.” So all the people shouted and said, “Long live the king!”

esv.text: And Samuel said to all the people, “Do you see him whom the Lord has chosen? There is none like him among all the people.” And all the people shouted, “Long live the king!”

cnv.text: 撒母耳對眾民說：“你們看見耶和華所揀選的人沒有？在眾人中沒有一個可與他相比。”眾人就大聲歡呼：“願王萬歲！”

ccb.text: 撒母耳对百姓说：“这就是耶和华为你们选的人。在以色列没有人能比得上他。”众人高呼：“愿王万岁！”
